name: No VGM, no load
message: Packed container requires Verified Gross Mass before loading.

name: US ocean import requires ISF
if: destination_country=US AND mode=sea AND is_import=true AND isf_status != filed
message: ISF 10+2 must be filed no later than 24 hours before vessel loading for US-bound ocean cargo.

name: EU/NI/NO/CH inbound or transit requires ENS/ICS2 path
if: destination_or_transit_in=EU/NI/NO/CH AND mode=sea AND ens_ics2_status NOT IN [filed, responsible_party_confirmed]
message: ENS/ICS2 safety/security data path must be confirmed for goods brought to or transiting covered territories.

name: DG declaration required for dangerous goods
message: Dangerous goods require DG declaration before sea readiness can pass.

name: DG container packing certificate required
if: dangerous_goods=true AND containerized_cargo=true AND cpc_status != complete
message: DG packed in a container/vehicle requires packing certificate status.

name: Shipping instructions required
message: Carrier documentation cannot proceed without shipping instructions.

name: Cross-border commercial docs required
if: cross_border=true AND commercial_goods=true AND (commercial_invoice_status=missing OR packing_list_status=missing)
message: Cross-border commercial shipment needs invoice and packing list readiness.

name: Certificate of origin conditional check
message: Certificate of origin may be required; validate before customs or document presentation.

name: Regulated cargo permit check
message: Regulated cargo needs export/import permit screening before clean readiness.
